response:
SECTION 1  
"What would an innocent person say after he falsely received a verdict from the court?"  

SECTION 2  
"Lead the way, sir, and I’ll show you the truth. The silver lining of this situation is that the stranger’s words may yet reveal the lead that could unravel the lie. Wrap your mind around the gravity of what has transpired, for the truth is always more valuable than the false assurance of a verdict."
